channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pharma Ad Scrutiny a Test for Free Speech
item.description: Don’t let Washington decide what Americans are allowed to hear.

item.title: What The ‘Asian Grind Culture’ Panic Gets Wrong About American Education
item.description: Not all Asians are narrow-minded grinders, nor are all non-Asians free-spirited risk-takers.

item.title: Ed O’Keefe’s Trump Derangement Is So Bad, Even The White House Press Corps Is Laughing At Him
item.description: CBS News’ Ed O’Keefe learned a new concept Wednesday: facts. During Wednesday’s White House press briefing, O’Keefe asked White House Press Secretary ...

item.title: It’s no time to go quiet on sustainability. Just ask beauty giant L’Oreal
item.description: L’Oréal is betting millions that sustainability can drive profits as well as protect the planet.

item.title: DC Mayor Bowser declares emergency over Potomac sewage spill, asks for federal help
item.description: D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser declared a disaster emergency over the historic Potomac sewage spill that dumped 240 million gallons into river.

item.title: From mom-and-pops to Goldman Sachs, Jesse Jackson’s vision for American business sparked a revolution
item.description: The civil rights leader, whose dealmaking skills pushed Wall Street to invest in minority-owned businesses, died on Tuesday.

item.title: In Politics, Social Media Has Supplanted Experience
item.description: The clip is the product. Governance is incidental.

item.title: America’s Earliest Outdoor Photographs Shown at Hartford’s Wadsworth Atheneum
item.description: Your critic wanted to see this lovely show so much that he put his contempt for the museum’s trustees in abeyance for a day.

item.title: Another ‘Detransitioner’ Is Suing Her Pro-Trans Therapist For Malpractice
item.description: Publicizing the harm of transgender surgery will vilify the procedures and further isolate them.

item.title: Adversaries: California plan to tax billionaires puts Sanders and Newsom at odds
item.description: As national Democrats search for a unifying theme ahead of the fall's midterm elections, a California proposal to levy a hefty tax on billionaires is ...

item.title: Globalism And America-Hating Destroy All The Fun Of Watching The Olympics
item.description: More patriotism, less politics, please.

item.title: Sue-Pervised Retirement
item.description: Rampant litigation against 401(k) sponsors is narrowing employees’ investment choices and eroding their retirement wealth.

item.title: American Express and Visa alumni raise $4 million for Rhythmic, which partners with brands to provide financial products for their customers
item.description: Startup aims to make stablecoins more accessible to the general public.

item.title: RNC sues to stop Democrats' Virginia redistricting push
item.description: RNC and two GOP lawmakers sue to stop Virginia Democrats' push to redraw congressional maps, claiming constitutional violations in amendment process.

item.title: Trump’s ‘no-nonsense’ DC crackdown tops 10k arrests as DOJ declares era of ‘unchecked violence is over’
item.description: Crime drops dramatically in Washington, D.C., as President Donald Trump's federal task force reports 10,000 arrests and 1,000 firearms recovered. Murd...

item.title: This Fortune 500 CEO says ‘lean manufacturing’—the management philosophy Toyota made famous—is a prerequisite for leveraging AI
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Trump’s tariffs are a ‘dirty tax’ that will make the $38.6 trillion national debt crisis even worse over the long term, top analyst says
item.description: "The idea that this is pro-American is actually just the opposite," Penn Wharton's Kent Smetters told Fortune. "It hurts American manufacturers."

item.title: Mamdani’s Utopian Vision Faces Reality
item.description: The socialist superstar is already threatening to hike the property taxes of middle-class New Yorkers.

item.title: How ICE went from post-9/11 counterterror agency to center of the immigration fight
item.description: ICE hasn't received much operational guidance from Congress since its creation, a break with lawmaker scrutiny over its operations under the Trump adm...

item.title: EU Parliament Says Men Are Women And Anyone Can Get Pregnant
item.description: The EU Parliament has done great harm. This is far more than progressive virtue signaling. We hear warnings of transhumanism.

item.title: HHS wipes out 36,000 pages of ‘regulatory dark matter’ in sweeping child welfare office purge
item.description: Administration for Children and Families eliminated thousands of obsolete guidance documents to reduce confusion for the Head Start school readiness p...

item.title: What the Market Knows That WACC Doesn’t
item.description: Market-implied discount rates reveal how investors price risk, often diverging from WACC and reshaping capital decisions. The post What the Market Kno...

item.title: FDA will drop two-study requirement for new drug approvals, aiming to speed access
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration plans to drop its longtime standard of requiring two rigorous studies to win approval for new drugs, the latest chang...

item.title: Norman C. Francis, civil rights champion and recipient of Presidential Medal of Freedom, dies at 94
item.description: Norman C. Francis, a civil rights pioneer and champion of education who played a pivotal role in helping rebuild New Orleans after Hurricane Katrina, ...

item.title: WH adviser Hassett urges 'discipline' for Fed economists over tariff study
item.description: President Donald Trump's top economist on Wednesday urged that Federal Reserve economists be punished for research last week that showed American comp...

item.title: Republicans sue to stop Virginia redistricting referendum
item.description: Republican organizations filed a lawsuit Wednesday objecting to Virginia Democrats' 2026 redistricting ballot referendum for using misleading language...

item.title: Attention Bias in AI-Driven Investing
item.description: AI tools may favor popular stocks over overlooked ones, embedding attention bias into investment decisions. The post Attention Bias in AI-Driven Inves...

item.title: Social Security Claiming Strategies for High-Net-Worth Clients
item.description: Social Security claiming is a capital-allocation decision for affluent clients. This analysis weighs taxes, longevity risk, and liquidity trade-offs. ...

item.title: Evolving Your Wealth Management Practice for 2026 and Beyond
item.description: Wealth management’s 2026 outlook: growth will hinge on transparency, integration, and relevance to women and next-generation investors. The post Evolv...

item.title: AI Is Reshaping Bank Risk
item.description: AI is exposing the limits of legacy bank controls, making governance quality critical to resilience and investor confidence. The post AI Is Reshaping ...
